open_issues.notes: A public secondary market estimate exists, but strict v2 needs a primary or official statistical source before this can be promoted.

open_issues.claim_text: Agencies can charge €1,500 more per placement with language included.
open_issues.notes: No public source reviewed confirmed this uplift.

open_issues.claim_text: A turnkey package can be bundled into the agency placement fee.
The product can be delivered as a new independent certified route without partner/accreditation work.
open_issues.notes: No public evidence supports a free-standing certified route.

falsification_searches.result: Search surfaced multiple affirmative public pages in Belgium, Luxembourg, Germany, and Ireland. The concept exists; the product-specific packaging does not.
Public secondary market snippets repeat the figure, but the evidence is not primary-source-safe and other public estimates vary materially.
No public source confirmed the uplift.
